2005June 17, 2005

🇪🇸 Valencia, Spain

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Valencia, Spain, June 17, 2005

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2005-06-valencia-spain

13 Resolutions

652Plenary
Invite ISO/TC 10 to discuss proposed NWI to avoid overlap
SC 4 also notes that the proposed scope of part 101 of this ISO/TC 10 multi-part standard appears to have a large overlap with its ongoing and published work on component libraries and reference hi...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
651Plenary
Nominate JEMIMA as Registration Authority for ISO 13584-501
In the absence of any specific recommendation from JWG 1, SC 4 requests its secretariat to take the necessary steps with ISO to request the establishment of a Registration Authority as defined in 1...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
650Plenary
Request ISO CS complete URN guidance and host equivalent URLs
SC 4 requests ISOCS to complete the 'tcdefined' section of SC 4/N1916, including guidance on the use of this section for the identification of an object within an ISO standard, and circulate the re...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
649Plenary
Direct liaison officers to expedite ISO/IEC JWG 1 tasks
SC 4 directs its nominated liaison officers and experts as shown in Resolution 611 & 627 to endeavor to expedite the completion of the JWG 1 tasks and report progress to SC 4. The Chairman of SC 4 ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
648Plenary
Adopt policy for format and layout of SC 4 standards
SC 4 adopts the following policy with regard to format and layout of SC 4 standards: * Parts delivered to ISO in HTML shall follow the format and layout as given in the HTML Guidelines. * Parts del...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
647Plenary
Appoint liaison officers to ISO/TC 37
SC 4 appoints Wolfgang Wilkes, Eric Sardet, Magne Valen-Sendstad, Peter Benson and Gerry Radack as liaison officers to ISO/TC 37.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
646Plenary
Appoint liaison officers to ISO/TC 184/SC 5/WG 7
SC 4 sees a potential need of cooperation with its projects ISO 10303-239 "Product Life Cycle Support" (PLCS), ISO 15926 and the ASAM ODS PAS 22720. To avoid any overlap or gaps in the development ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
645Plenary
Nominate Wolfgang Wilkes as liaison to ISO/TC 172
SC 4 nominates Wolfgang Wilkes as liaison officer to ISO/TC 172 "Optics and Photonics".
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
644Plenary
Appoint Anna Moreno as Education and Outreach Rapporteur
SC 4 appoints Mrs. Anna Moreno as the new SC 4 Education and Outreach Rapporteur to act as the focal point for SC 4 outreach, education, and promotional activities. These activities should be close...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
643Plenary
Approve project leaders and editors for ISO 10303-0111 and ISO 13584-0026 TC 1

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
